questions.question: Who did Salmon (Σαλμὼν) give birth to?
Who did Boes (Βόες) give birth to?
Who did Boes (Βόες) give birth to, and from whom?
questions.answers: Jobed (Ἰωβὴδ) was born to Boes from Rahab (ἐκ τῆς Ῥαχάβ).

questions.question: Who did Jobed (Ἰωβὴδ) give birth to?
Who did Jobed (Ἰωβὴδ) give birth to, and from whom?
questions.answers: Jesse (Ἰεσσαί) was born to Jobed from Ruth (Ἰωβὴδ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν Ἰεσσαί).
